summary: PR 2736 adjusted source definitions, symbol metadata, and split ownership to improve GALE01 data matching across stage, item, fighter, VI, baselib, and MSL files. The bot report shows +0.12% matched data, 11 new data matches, and two unmatched-code regressions.

key_files.role: Adjusted section ownership: shortened grpushon .sbss, added grfigureget .sbss, and moved ittincle .rodata from itkyasarin to ittincle.
Updated symbol sizes, scopes, data kinds, and labels for grpushon, grfigureget, grmaterial, ittincle, and VI sbss symbols.
Added an .sdata2 order helper and replaced some literal math expressions with M_TAU and M_PI_2 forms.
Renamed local params type and sbss pointer from address-style extern grFigureGet_804D6AC0 to static yakumono_param, with call sites updated.
Converted several extern data declarations into defined const Vec3/float data, added an .sdata order helper, moved light descriptor/config placement, and changed an assert to use HSD_LObjGetType.
Large item data/source reshaping, including include changes and an ItemStateTable definition in the loaded excerpt.
Touched item file associated with the new ittincle .rodata split ownership and 100% rodata match in bot report.
One-line type/header change; exact hunk not present in loaded excerpt.
One-line baselib LObj change; exact hunk not present in loaded excerpt.

what_changed: Adjusted GALE01 split ranges so grfigureget owns .sbss 0x804D6AC0-0x804D6AC8 and ittincle owns .rodata 0x803B8740-0x803B8750.
Changed multiple symbols from global 4byte-style metadata to local float/string metadata, especially grpushon rodata/sdata and ittincle rodata.
Split or resized data symbols such as grMaterial_803E0A20, grPushOn_803E7B10, grPushOn_803E7B90, grPushOn_804D6AB8, and un_804D6F84.
Added named labels for previously absorbed data/string ranges, including lbl_803E0AFC, lbl_803E7B44, lbl_803E7BAC, and lbl_803E7CA8.
In grpushon.c, replaced extern data declarations with source-owned Vec3 const and float definitions and repositioned HSD_LightDesc/light_configs data.
In grfigureget.c, made the stage parameter pointer static and renamed it yakumono_param; renamed grFigureGet_Data to grFigureGet_Params.
In ftYs_SpecialS.c, added an .sdata2 order helper and used M_TAU/M_PI_2 expressions in angle math.
Bot report recorded 11 new data matches and two unmatched-item regressions.
smart_moves: Coordinated source definitions with symbols.txt and splits.txt rather than only changing C source, which is appropriate for data-section matching work.
Used local scope in symbol metadata for data that the diff shows is source-local or TU-owned after the change.
Converted address-style grFigureGet_804D6AC0 usage into a static named pointer, yakumono_param, where the source now treats it as a file-local parameter pointer.
Replaced a manual LObj type-mask assert expression in grpushon with HSD_LObjGetType, aligning with helper use when the helper is available.

decomp_lessons.lesson: Data-match PRs may require synchronized edits across source data definitions, split ranges, and symbol metadata; changing only the C file can leave section ownership mismatched.
When a data object is proven to belong to a translation unit, tightening symbol scope from global to local can be part of the match fix.
Helper/API restoration can still matter inside data-focused PRs; grpushon changed an inlined LOBJ_TYPE_MASK assert back to HSD_LObjGetType.

naming_conventions.name: yakumono_param
naming_conventions.context: Replaces address-style grFigureGet_804D6AC0 for a static grFigureGet_Params pointer initialized from Ground_801C49F8.

naming_conventions.name: grFigureGet_Params
naming_conventions.context: Renames grFigureGet_Data typedef to a params-oriented name.

naming_conventions.name: M_TAU_F
naming_conventions.context: New float tau macro added beside M_PI_F in MSL math.h.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Added explicit .sdata and .sdata2 order helper functions containing unused literal references.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The helpers are marked @todo order hacks; existing standards require explicit evidence for data/order tactics and discourage treating them as normal source style.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Reordered data definitions in grpushon.c by moving grPushOn_804D4948, grPushOn_803E7B90, and light_configs later in the file.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: Supported by the bot's data-match improvement, but the loaded evidence does not include objdiff details for neighboring codegen beyond the bot summary.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Changed constants from compound expressions to canonical macros such as M_TAU and M_PI_2 to influence literal/data ordering while retaining readable math.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The PR evidence supports the edit but does not prove a general naming or macro policy.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Adjusted symbols.txt object sizes/scopes to split large data ranges into smaller owned symbols and labels.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: This is data ownership work and should be backed by section/symbol evidence for each case.

review_feedback.feedback: GALE01 report: matched data improved to 48.04% (+0.12%, +1448 bytes) and linked data to 41.10% (+24 bytes). It listed 11 new matches including itkusudama .data, grpushon .rodata/.data/.sdata/.sbss, ittincle .rodata, ftYs_SpecialS .sdata2, grfigureget .sbss, vi0501 .sbss, and grmaterial .data.
The same report showed two regressions in unmatched items: itkusudama it_80289BE8 -16 bytes and grpushon grPushOn_802190D0 -5 bytes.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs touching order_sdata or order_sdata2_0 to see whether the order hacks were removed or normalized.
Search grPushOn_802190D0 regressions after PR 2736 to see how the -5 unmatched-code regression was repaired.
Search it_80289BE8 after PR 2736 to see how the -16 regression from itkusudama data work was handled.
Search yakumono_param and grFigureGet_Params for whether the naming persisted in later stage files.
Search M_TAU_F and M_TAU uses to determine whether tau macros became an accepted local convention or were only data-order aids.

notes: PR body is empty and there are no human review comments in the loaded slice.
The loaded diff is truncated for itkusudama and does not show the exact hunks for ittincle.c, vi/types.h, or lobj.c.
Bot report provides strong evidence for data-match changes and regressions but not detailed objdiff or author intent.
Order helper functions are explicitly marked @todo hacks, so they should not be promoted as accepted source style.

accepted_candidate_records.title: PR2736 data matching combined source, symbols, and splits edits
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2736 improved data matches by coordinating C source data definitions with GALE01 symbols.txt and splits.txt section ownership changes. Bot report showed 11 new data matches and +1448 matched-data bytes.

accepted_candidate_records.title: PR2736 retained explicit data-order hacks
accepted_candidate_records.text: The PR added @todo .sdata/.sdata2 order helper functions in grpushon.c and ftYs_SpecialS.c. Treat this as PR-specific matching evidence, not a general source-style endorsement.

source_update_candidates.title: Clarify treatment of .sdata/.sdata2 order helper hacks
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2736 includes helper functions marked @todo .sdata order hack and @todo .sdata2 order hack. Consider adding examples under matching-tactics-need-evidence that such helpers are narrow data-order tactics requiring explicit match evidence and follow-up cleanup, not normal authored source style.
source_update_candidates.reason: Existing standards already require evidence for tactics; this PR provides a concrete historical example with @todo order hacks.

source_update_candidates.title: grpushon.c data matching in PR2736 used source-owned consts and data reordering
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2736 converted several grpushon extern data references into defined Vec3 const/float data, moved light descriptor/config placement, and updated symbols/splits to reach 100% grpushon .rodata/.data/.sdata/.sbss data matches per bot report.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potentially useful path-scoped history for future grpushon data/order work.

source_update_candidates.title: ftYs_SpecialS.c PR2736 changed angle constants and added .sdata2 order helper
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2736 added order_sdata2_0 and changed Yoshi special angle math to use M_TAU and M_PI_2 expressions; bot report says ftYs_SpecialS .sdata2 reached 100%.
source_update_candidates.reason: Path-scoped clue for future edits involving literal ordering in this file.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that order_sdata/order_sdata2 helper functions are accepted global style; they are explicitly labeled @todo hacks.
Do not infer human reviewer approval of the two bot-reported regressions; no human review comments are loaded.
Do not generalize M_TAU or M_TAU_F as an accepted project-wide replacement rule from this PR alone.
Do not claim exact behavior of itkusudama, ittincle, vi/types.h, or lobj.c hunks beyond what changed-file metadata, visible diff, and bot report show.
